title: Principal Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Tata Elxsi Global Group in Vijayawada offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!
